title: Payment
description: The settlement of an Order under the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2). A Payment is authorized by a Consent (the buyer's payment mandate), secured by a Credential, draws on a Resource (budget/tokens), and is carried over the AP2 Protocol. Authorization, capture, and refund are each Events advancing the Payment's State — the verifiable audit trail an agent-initiated transaction requires.

method.description: card | bank | wallet | stablecoin | x402 | credits.

mandateId.description: AP2 mandate identifier the buyer agent presented to authorize this payment.
